'''Tolan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tolan system/Legends|Tolan system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was the location of the [[Tolan Navy Yards|Tolan Navy Shipyards]], near [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]] and probably within a few sectors of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].

==History==
When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] transport [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] was damaged in a skirmish at [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]], she diverted to Tolan for repairs, before continuing to [[Coronar]].

==Appearances==
